summary: The diff implements REQ-8 comprehensively. The index.css replaces dark navy CSS custom properties with OKLCH-based light neutral and amber palettes, updates semantic tokens, and rewrites .payment-card, .payment-input, and .btn-gold component classes for light surfaces. PaymentPage.tsx removes the dark navy background and overlays, applying white/neutral-50 backgrounds to header, main, and footer with amber accents. PaymentForm.tsx updates labels, icons, error states, and the success confirmation screen to use neutral and amber light-theme classes. tailwind.config.js extends Tailwind with the new neutral and amber color palettes tied to the OKLCH CSS variables. All acceptance criteria appear addressed: light page background, light card surface, light input fields with dark text, amber accent button, red error messages on light backgrounds, light-themed success screen, updated header/footer, and no remaining dark navy palette.
